title: Singular Pringles crisp for sale on eBay for GBP 2,000 - as owner claims it's 'rare'
snippet: Have you ever opened up a bag of crisps and marvelled at the bizarre shape of one of the snacks? Finding a misshapen crisp isn't impossible,...
reason: The article is directly about a specific chip brand (Pringles) and the subject matter is a potato crisp, fitting the criteria for high relevance to a chip-focused website.
